title: Pots and Plants
description: A mod that adds more useful plants and decorations
body:
Description

Pots and Plants does indeed add both pots and plants as well as more decoration options for your world. All of the blocks/items were added to be useful and liven up your Minecraft world.

-Features-
Curtains - Come in all 16 colors, can be made to any length, able to be open and closed, right click with curtain to make longer
Mulch - Decorative dirt that comes in all wood 9 types
Large Flower Pots - Come in all 16 colors, full block, and can hold any plant
More Flowers - Flowers that did not craft into a specific color or didn't have a tall counterpart, now do. Each dimension has a new flower
Chain Fences - Come in all 9 wood types, can't be exploded, player can jump over it but mobs cannot
Shutters - Come in all 9 wood types, can be opened and closed
Turnips - Found in birch biomes, can be grown, thrown when standing up, eaten when crouching
Corn - Found in plains biome, can be grown, can be eaten 3 times
Dripleaf Flytrap - Found in lush caves, trap mobs in place and damage them, can be picked up with a flower pot
Tiled Glass and Tiled Glass Panes - Come in all 16 colors
Pebbles - Found anywhere, decorative tiny rocks, 4 different models, 4 can be crafted into cobblestone
 
-Tweaks-
Sugar Cane can be smelted into Lime Dye
Dead Bushes and Brown Mushrooms can be crafted into Brown Dye
Red Mushrooms and Crimson Fungus can be crafted into Red Dye
Warped Fungus can be crafted into Cyan Dye
Chorus Flower, Popped Chorus Fruit, and Chorus Fruit can be crafted into Purple Dye
